\tzpentry{ID5772}{Trawin Topology Unified Field Theory Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5772 introduces Trawin Topology Unified Field Theory Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} g_{\mu\nu} = \eta_{\mu\nu} + h_{\mu\nu}, \end{equation}
